subject: Improve UI/UX: Make intercompany default and add comprehensive tooltips
body:
- Swap mode tabs: Inter-Company Tool is now the default mode
- Add help icons (?) with detailed modal explanations throughout:
  - Mode switcher buttons explain each tool's purpose
  - All 5 pricing models have tooltips with formulas and use cases
  - All 5 intercompany calculator tabs have help tooltips
  - Wizard/Direct mode toggle buttons include explanations
  - All form inputs have clickable help icons for detailed info
- Add CSS styles for help icons with hover effects and accessibility
- Update documentation with new features and changelog entries
title: Improve UI/UX: Make intercompany default and add comprehensive tooltips
